pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Bouncy Castle library version to 1.84 to support newer JDKs.
Upgrade Byte Buddy library version to 1.14.11.
Replace Bouncy Castle PKIX artifact with the JDK 18+ compatible variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'bcpkix-jdk15on' is deprecated/removed in newer Bouncy Castle versions targeting JDK 17+; using the wrong artifact may cause runtime linkage errors or missing classes on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Bouncy Castle Provider artifact with the JDK 18+ compatible variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'bcprov-jdk15on' is deprecated/removed in newer Bouncy Castle versions targeting JDK 17+; using the wrong artifact may cause runtime linkage errors or missing classes on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Bouncy Castle TLS artifact with the JDK 18+ compatible variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'bctls-jdk15on' is deprecated/removed in newer Bouncy Castle versions targeting JDK 17+; using the wrong artifact may cause runtime linkage errors or missing classes on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a snapshot version compatible with newer toolchains.
